meta.title: Workflow Automation Consultant Australia | Power Automate, Make, n8n & Microsoft 365
meta.description: Automate repetitive business workflows with Power Automate, Make, n8n, Azure Logic Apps, Python scripts, and REST APIs. Amphibian Labs helps Australian SMBs remove manual admin without replacing existing systems.

automation.title: Workflow automation
automation.subtitle: Remove repetitive admin across the tools your team already uses.
automation.problem: Your team spends hours every week copying data, sending follow-up emails, updating spreadsheets, renaming files, generating reports, checking inboxes, and moving information between systems. None of this work is strategic. Most of it follows rules. That makes it a strong candidate for automation. The real cost is not only time - manual workflows create delays, inconsistent outputs, missed follow-ups, reporting errors, and quiet frustration.
automation.approach: We map the workflow end to end, identify the manual steps, define the business rules, and select the right automation pattern. Sometimes that means Power Automate inside Microsoft 365. Sometimes it means Make or n8n. Sometimes it means a lightweight Python script, Azure Logic App, webhook, or API-driven workflow. Every automation is designed with ownership in mind: clear triggers, visible logs, error handling, documentation, and handover.

scenario.title: Construction company - weekly compliance reporting
scenario.context: A construction firm was spending 6 hours every Friday compiling safety inspection data from multiple field tools into a compliance report for project managers.
scenario.solution: We built an automation that collects inspection data, cross-references project information from SharePoint, generates a formatted PDF report, and sends it to the right project managers before the weekly meeting.
scenario.outcome: Manual reporting time reduced from 6 hours to zero, with more consistent reports and fewer late submissions.

meta.title: System Integration Consultant Australia | API, Microsoft 365, SharePoint & CRM Integration
meta.description: Connect Microsoft 365, SharePoint, CRMs, accounting tools, EHRs, and third-party platforms with lightweight API integrations and middleware. Amphibian Labs helps SMBs avoid unnecessary migrations.

integration.title: System integration
integration.subtitle: Make your existing systems talk to each other.
integration.problem: Your business data is spread across too many places. Your CRM doesn't talk to your accounting tool. Your project management system doesn't know what's in your inbox. Your SharePoint folders are disconnected from your forms. Your team copies the same information into multiple platforms because nothing flows automatically. You may have been told the only solution is to migrate everything into one platform. That is often expensive, disruptive, and unnecessary.
integration.approach: We build lightweight integration layers between the systems you already use. That may mean direct API integration, middleware, Power Automate connectors, scheduled synchronisation, webhooks, or event-driven backend services. The goal is not to create a new platform. The goal is to make the tools you already use exchange clean, validated data.

scenario.title: Healthcare clinic - patient intake synchronisation
scenario.context: A multi-location clinic used separate tools for patient intake forms, appointment scheduling, and billing. Front desk staff manually re-entered patient data into each system, taking about 12 minutes per patient and creating avoidable errors.
scenario.solution: We built a FastAPI middleware layer that listens for new intake submissions, validates the data, and pushes it to scheduling and billing systems through their APIs.
scenario.outcome: Manual re-entry reduced to zero, with cleaner data and fewer downstream corrections.

meta.title: AI Document Extraction & OCR Automation Australia | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Extract structured data from PDFs, scanned documents, invoices, reports, medical records, and forms using OCR, NLP, validation rules, and AI-powered document intelligence pipelines.

ai-extraction.title: AI-powered data extraction
ai-extraction.subtitle: Turn documents into structured, usable data.
ai-extraction.problem: Your business runs on documents: invoices, medical reports, contracts, compliance forms, inspection reports, referral letters, pathology results, and spreadsheets. The data is there, but it's trapped inside PDFs, scanned images, inconsistent layouts, and unstructured text. Someone on your team reads the document, finds the useful fields, checks the numbers, and types the result into another system. That work is slow, expensive, and easy to get wrong.
ai-extraction.approach: We build AI-powered document processing backends that read, classify, extract, validate, and structure document data. A typical pipeline includes PDF ingestion, OCR for scanned documents, layout analysis for tables and key-value pairs, entity extraction using rules and NLP, field validation with confidence scoring, and structured output to CRMs, EHRs, SharePoint, or operational systems. The system is designed around your document types, not generic templates.

scenario.title: Medical practice - pathology report processing
scenario.context: A medical practice received 15–20 pathology reports per day. Admin staff manually transcribed patient identifiers, test names, results, units, and reference ranges into the EHR.
scenario.solution: We configured DocIQ, our open-source document intelligence engine, for pathology report layouts. The pipeline extracted structured clinical data and produced FHIR R4-compatible JSON ready for downstream import.
scenario.outcome: Approximately 3 hours of daily transcription removed, with confidence-based review for edge cases.

meta.title: Client Portals, Dashboards & Web Applications for SMBs | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Build client portals, dashboards, internal tools, and web applications connected to your existing business systems. Amphibian Labs creates practical web solutions using React, TypeScript, FastAPI, and modern APIs.

web-solutions.title: Web solutions and portals
web-solutions.subtitle: Give clients, staff, and managers a clean front door to your systems.
web-solutions.problem: Your backend systems might work, but people still need to ask for information manually. Clients email for status updates. Field staff call the office for job details. Managers wait for spreadsheets. Admin teams manually send the same information every week. The information exists, but it's not accessible in the right place, at the right time, for the right person.
web-solutions.approach: We build web portals, dashboards, and internal tools that sit on top of your existing systems. Your backend doesn't need to be replaced - we add a secure interface that connects to your APIs, databases, SharePoint, CRM, or project management tools. Depending on the use case, the solution may include authentication, role-based access, real-time status, document upload, reporting, notifications, and integration with automation workflows.

scenario.title: Professional services firm - client status portal
scenario.context: A consulting firm managed all client updates through email. Clients asked for status updates frequently, and project managers spent hours each week preparing manual summaries.
scenario.solution: We built a client portal connected to their existing project management system. Clients could log in to view milestones, deliverables, next steps, and automated progress summaries.
scenario.outcome: Client status enquiries dropped significantly, and project managers reclaimed time previously spent writing manual updates.

meta.title: Technology Vendor Selection & Software Advisory for SMBs | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Independent technology advisory for SMBs. Compare SaaS tools, custom builds, automation platforms, and open-source options based on fit, cost, maintainability, and lock-in risk.

vendor-selection.title: Vendor selection and advisory
vendor-selection.subtitle: Honest technical recommendations, even when they don't include us.
vendor-selection.problem: Every vendor says their product is the answer. But your business needs to know which features matter, what the real cost will be, whether the system integrates with your stack, and whether your team will actually use it. The wrong tool doesn't just waste money - it creates process debt.
vendor-selection.approach: We evaluate your requirements against realistic options: SaaS tools, open-source software, automation platforms, custom builds, and hybrid approaches. We score options based on functional fit, integration capability, total cost of ownership, maintenance burden, data portability, security and compliance requirements, lock-in risk, and implementation complexity. Our advice is independent - we don't resell software, and we don't need to force a custom build where a simple tool works better.

scenario.title: Trades business - choosing a job management platform
scenario.context: A plumbing business with 15 staff was comparing several job management platforms. Each demo looked strong, but the owner could not separate useful features from sales noise.
scenario.solution: We mapped the actual workflow, identified required features, scored each platform against operational needs, and recommended the simplest option that covered most use cases.
scenario.outcome: The business chose confidently and avoided overbuying software it didn't need.

meta.title: CRM Cleanup, Deduplication & Automation Consultant | Amphibian Labs
meta.description: Clean, deduplicate, restructure, and automate CRM data in HubSpot, Salesforce, Zoho, Dynamics 365, and other CRMs. Amphibian Labs helps SMBs make customer data reliable again.

crm-cleanup.title: CRM cleanup and optimisation
crm-cleanup.subtitle: Make your CRM useful again.
crm-cleanup.problem: Your CRM was supposed to create clarity. Instead, it contains duplicate contacts, incomplete records, inconsistent fields, abandoned pipelines, unreliable reports, and data nobody fully trusts. When people stop trusting the CRM, they build side spreadsheets. Then the CRM becomes a historical archive instead of an operational system.
crm-cleanup.approach: We start with a data audit. We identify duplicates, missing fields, inconsistent formats, broken lifecycle stages, unused properties, and reporting gaps. Then we clean and restructure the data with your team's input. After cleanup, we add validation rules, automations, and process guidance so the data doesn't decay again.

scenario.title: Real estate agency - contact database overhaul
scenario.context: A real estate agency had 12,000 CRM contacts. After years of inconsistent use, many records were duplicated, incomplete, or unreliable.
scenario.solution: We exported and profiled the data, built a deduplication workflow using fuzzy matching, merged records based on completeness, and re-imported a cleaner dataset. We then added validation rules and automation to reduce future decay.
scenario.outcome: The CRM became usable for reporting and campaigns again.
